form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of 11 weeks. Finished off last preparation when beaten by 8 m finishing fifth after being driven well back, after a quick start, behind Thelittle Master at this track over 1730m in a 4yo+ 0-3W/17 0K stake on January 23 at $8. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.
